original_image_tags: Three hole-punch marks are visible along the top edge of the page. There is a handwritten strike-through mark over the number "51" in the first column.

elements.description: Typed table containing 19 rows of data with column headers: LAUNCH SEQ, DATE, NICKNAME, OP #, FACILITY, VEHICLE TYPE, PROGRAM, CUM BY BOOSTER, COMMAND, CUM BY COMMAND. Rows are numbered 39 through 57. Includes a footnote '(*) Data not available' and page number 'PAGE 3'. No photographs, sketches, or diagrams are present.

judge.reason: Description B states there are no photographs, sketches, or diagrams, which is consistent with Description A's focus on punch marks and a handwritten strike-through, though A mentions visual elements (handwriting, punch marks) that B does not explicitly describe.
